0	50	55	0	33	51	0	57	28	0	0	21	42	12	2	47	47	5	0	16	0	0	1	0	27	57	6	26	0	0	0	0	32	35	59	33	0	0	0	0	22	40	0	0	0	0	26	0	23	5	0	16	10	38	51	42	0	0	0	36	0	0	13	28	32	19	48	0	0	33	7	0	0	0	0	3	0	24	0	0	37	0	56	0	0	56	0	0	0	0	0	0	53	23	0	0	14	31	8	20	48	44	0	32	1	7	58	0	57	36	44	5	0	8	10	21	0	27	51	0	

#Weights:

1	27	26	1	9	1	18	11	29	18	20	13	24	10	3	5	4	25	30	28	28	10	24	4	10	14	17	21	27	18	27	15	20	8	14	26	25	4	7	24	23	15	23	18	15	24	6	12	20	11	1	26	18	7	2	19	7	29	13	27	18	2	12	26	13	6	19	23	16	18	4	17	13	15	28	28	14	17	23	6	25	20	1	25	30	6	28	15	12	14	22	19	7	28	21	29	19	20	8	20	18	12	18	20	21	5	22	20	1	19	1	16	29	3	27	23	1	12	25	17	
99 #capacity

2 #k: cardinality
